---
title: "Amanda Eiser Hess"
pagetitle: "Amanda Eiser Hess"
first-name: "Amanda"
last-name: "Eiser Hess"
credentials: "MS, CCC-SLP"
position: "PhD Student"
affiliation: "University of Virginia"
pronouns: "she/her"
orcid: "0009-0008-9527-0893"
date-joined: "2026-02-09"
order: 8
categories:
  - "Collaborator"
description-research: "Amanda Eiser Hess is a PhD student in the Special Education program at the University of Virginia. Her research focuses on two areas: 1) caregiver coaching to support multimodal communicative participation for young children with disabilities, and 2) metascience focused on improving accessibility and replicability through open science. She previously worked as a preschool speech-language pathologist, specializing in augmentative and alternative communication for children with cerebral palsy."
headshot: "../_headshots/amanda_eiser_hess.jpeg"
lightbox: false
draft: false
layout: article
title-block-categories: false
editor: source
---

:::::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![{{< meta title >}}, {{< meta credentials >}}<br>{{< meta position >}}<br>{{< meta affiliation >}}](../_headshots/amanda_eiser_hess.jpeg)
:::
::: {.column width="5%"}
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}
{{< meta description-research >}}

:::
::::::
